headline: Assessing Baker Hughes (BKR) Valuation After New 60 Month Petrobras Service Agreement
summary: Baker Hughes (BKR) just secured a 60 month service agreement with Petrobras to support up to 64 aeroderivative gas turbines across Brazilian offshore FPSOs and a major refinery, highlighting long term service visibility and on the ground expansion. See our latest analysis for Baker Hughes. Despite a small 1 day share price pullback, Baker Hughes’ 7 day share price return of 11.22% sits alongside a 34.98% 90 day gain and 28.02% year to date rise. The 1 year total shareholder return of 39.59%...
